rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts inside annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use component type scopes for interface-level assumptions and guarantees, implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings
generic_rules: Use const, eq, assume, and guarantee syntax with valid AADL type expressions
Ensure all visible identifiers are properly scoped and typed in AGREE expressions
Encode only interface behavior in component type contracts, implementation details in component implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted strings
Constants and equations must be declared with proper type annotations
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type annexes
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and architecture redesign patterns
